## Intent
Apply independent correct implementations for overflow, display, and box-model features.

## Apply Instructions
Apply directly as these patches do not conflict and are cleanly implemented based on the prior review.

## Intent
Apply independent correct implementations for sizing, positioning, and table layouts.

## Apply Instructions
Apply directly as these patches do not conflict and are cleanly implemented based on the prior review.

## Intent
Apply independent correct implementations for text alignment, fonts, and inline formatting.

## Apply Instructions
Apply directly as these patches do not conflict and are cleanly implemented based on the prior review.

## Intent
Unify display blockification logic for absolute, fixed, floated, or root elements.

## Refactoring Needed
Instead of scattering `if/else` checks directly inside `LayoutTreeBuilder::process_node` in `layout_tree.rs` (which creates overlapping conflicts), use the existing `get_computed_display()` function from `layout/src/solver3/getters.rs`. Compute the blockified display type *once* before assigning `node.computed_style.display`.

## Apply Instructions
Merge these patches by deleting all scattered blockification logic in `process_node` and substituting it with a single unified call to `get_computed_display()`.

## Intent
Prevent `display: contents` from unboxing replaced elements (like images) in the layout tree.

## Refactoring Needed
All three patches modify `layout_tree.rs` to intercept `display: contents`. Instead of producing duplicate checks, combine the `is_replaced_element()` check and `display: contents` override into a single, clean structural block inside `process_node`. Fall back to `LayoutDisplay::None` when an element is both replaced and specifies `display: contents`.

## Intent
Implement the CSS 2.2 §10.8.1 rule where `overflow != visible` causes an inline-block's baseline to fall back to the bottom margin edge.

## Refactoring Needed
Three patches independently try to override the baseline calculation for `FormattingContext::InlineBlock` inside `collect_and_measure_inline_content_impl` (in `fc.rs`). Consolidate into a single conditional check inside the `LayoutDisplay::InlineBlock` matching block. Read `overflow_x` and `overflow_y` from `ComputedLayoutStyle` to force the baseline to the bottom margin edge when overflow is clipped.

## Intent
Force `direction` to `Ltr` when `text-orientation: upright` is active.

## Refactoring Needed
CSS Writing Modes 4 requires this, but the agents patched varying layers. Consolidate the override strictly inside the `WritingModeContext::new` initialization in `layout/src/solver3/geometry.rs` (or equivalent context init). This ensures that all layout math (including margin collapsing and alignment) sees the forced LTR direction, not just the text shaping engine.

## Intent
Add unified font metrics abstraction for `x-height` and `cap-height`.

## Refactoring Needed
All 5 patches independently append `x_height` and `cap_height` to `LayoutFontMetrics` in `text3/cache.rs` and apply fallback logic (`0.5em`). Rewrite `LayoutFontMetrics` to include `x_height: Option<f32>` and `cap_height: Option<f32>`. Update `LayoutFontMetrics::from_font_metrics` to parse these from the OS/2 table if available, and add fallback getters (e.g., `get_x_height_or_fallback(font_size)`) returning `0.5em` when missing.

## Intent
Implement `scrollbar-gutter` space reservation.

## Refactoring Needed
Move all `scrollbar-gutter` space reservation logic purely into `compute_scrollbar_info_core` in `layout/src/solver3/cache.rs`. Do NOT apply it directly inside `layout_bfc`. Taffy-based flex/grid contexts don't use `layout_bfc`, so applying it there causes scrollbars to overlap flex content. Centralizing it in `compute_scrollbar_info_core` applies the reservation uniformly to BFC, Flex, and Grid contexts.

## Intent
Implement sticky position constraint mathematics (clamping to nearest scrollport).

## Refactoring Needed
Sticky positioning requires complex boundary mathematics. Patches incorrectly inject this directly into relative positioning loops or the main BFC pass, destroying readability. In `layout/src/solver3/positioning.rs`, create a dedicated `adjust_sticky_positions` function and call it sequentially after `adjust_relative_positions`. Keep the scrollport clamping math strictly isolated there.

## Intent
Implement `overflow-clip-margin` expansion mathematics.

## Refactoring Needed
Five different patches implement this independently by modifying dense inline calculations in `display_list.rs` around the `clip_rect` assignments. Keep only one implementation and extract the `clip_rect` expansion mathematics into a small, standalone helper function. This will keep the inline layout engine flow clean.

## Intent
Suppress painting, scrollbars, and hit tests for `visibility: hidden` elements.

## Refactoring Needed
Multiple patches try to suppress drawing borders/backgrounds by injecting local `get_visibility() == Hidden` checks scattered all over `display_list.rs`. This is incorrect because visibility inherits (a visible child inside a hidden parent must still be drawn). Create a centralized `is_node_visible()` state or helper derived during the layout tree generation/reconciliation phase that takes CSS inheritance into account.

## Intent
Support `unicode-bidi: plaintext` paragraph direction auto-detection.

## Refactoring Needed
Add the `unicode-bidi` state properly to `UnifiedConstraints`. Update the paragraph auto-direction heuristics in `layout/src/text3/cache.rs` inside `get_base_direction_from_logical()` to trigger dynamically *only* when the constraint dictates `plaintext`, overriding the inherited LTR/RTL base direction.

## Intent
Implement hanging punctuation logic for CJK text layout.

## Refactoring Needed
Three patches copy-paste the exact same massive `match` block of Unicode commas and stops into `is_hanging_punctuation` inside `text3/cache.rs`. Keep exactly one copy by extracting it into a single, reusable `is_hanging_punctuation_char(c: char) -> bool` function.

## Intent
Resolve CSS Overflow 3 §3.1 rules: if one axis scrolls, visible becomes auto, and clip becomes hidden.

## Refactoring Needed
Keep the object-oriented method approach (`is_visible_or_clip`) on the `LayoutOverflow` enum itself in `layout/src/solver3/getters.rs` to resolve these rules. Delete the standalone function implementation.

## Intent
Apply half-leading trimming for `text-box-trim`.

## Refactoring Needed
Do not shift physical text item positions inside `text3/cache.rs` because shifting items breaks hit-testing and cursor mapping. Instead, implement the layout approach: modify the container bounds directly inside `layout_bfc` in `fc.rs` so the line box itself shrinks.

## Intent
Track and replicate `position: fixed` elements on every page in paged media.

## Refactoring Needed
Both patches modify `DisplayListBuilder`. Use the `fixed_position_item_ranges` data structure for tracking ranges across pages in `layout/src/solver3/display_list.rs`. Avoid tracking single indices as that approach breaks multi-element fixed position support.
SKIP — These patches were identified as fake/lazy implementations that merely drop comments into the code instead of actually implementing the required structural logic.
